ecActivities.name: 學生會
ecActivities.description: 負責學生活動統籌，協助學校大型活動組織
ecActivities.en_description: Responsible for student event coordination and assisting in major school activities

ecActivities.name: 藝術學會
ecActivities.description: 帶領會員進行藝術創作，策劃校內藝術展覽
ecActivities.en_description: Led members in artistic creation and organized school art exhibitions

self_intro_zh:
我是黃曉琳，一個充滿創意和熱情的女孩。我熱愛藝術，擅長繪畫和小提琴，曾多次在校際比賽中獲獎。我積極參與學校活動，擔任學生會秘書和藝術學會會長，培養了良好的領導和組織能力。

貴校作為頂尖直資學校，擁有卓越的學術水平和多元發展空間，正是我夢寐以求的學習環境。我相信在貴校的栽培下，我能在學業和藝術領域取得更大成就。

學習目標：在嚴謹的學術環境中保持優異成績，同時發展藝術特長。

規劃：短期融入高中課程；中期爭取國際考試佳績；長期赴海外頂尖藝術學院深造。
self_intro_en:
I am Emily Wong, a creative and passionate girl. I love art, excel in painting and violin, and have won multiple awards in inter-school competitions. I actively participate in school activities, serving as Student Union Secretary and Art Club President, developing strong leadership and organizational skills.

As a top DSS school with excellent academic standards and diverse development opportunities, your school is exactly the learning environment I dream of. I believe that under your school's guidance, I can achieve greater success both academically and artistically.

My Goals: Maintain excellent grades in a rigorous academic environment while developing my artistic talents.

My Plans: Short-term: integrate into high school curriculum. Medium-term: achieve outstanding results in international exams. Long-term: pursue further studies at top overseas art institutions.

teacher_comment.school: St. Paul's Co-educational College Primary School
teacher_comment.comment_zh: Emily是一位全面的學生，學業優異，藝術天賦突出，領導能力強。她在課堂上積極參與，對學習充滿熱忱。強烈推薦她加入貴校。
teacher_comment.comment_en: Emily is a well-rounded student who excels academically, demonstrates outstanding artistic talent, and possesses strong leadership skills. She is an active participant in class with genuine enthusiasm for learning. I strongly recommend her admission.
